title: Hymenopus oblongifolius
taxonomy: Hymenopus oblongifolius is a species of praying mantis, a type of insect belonging to the order Mantodea. This order is further classified into the infraorder Mantodea and the suborder Mantodea as well. The family to which Hymenopus oblongifolius belongs is Hymenopodidae. The genus Hymenopus is also a part of this family and includes several species of praying mantis. It is classified under the kingdom Animalia.
